reuse_policy.permitted_use: read-only comparison of architectural skeletons and negative-test ideas followed by selective clean reimplementation from the accepted main baseline

required_disposition: Do not copy, stage, commit, or publish either Replay canary result file.
Do not classify Replay observations as primary, accepted, official, or Gate B evidence.
Do not retain any provider response, issuer value, token-derived metadata, or consumed authorization marker.
Do not reuse any Replay HG record, consumed marker, authorization claim, canary result, or network observation.
If any candidate code is reimplemented, bind it to new mock-only tests and current clean bytes rather than candidate acceptance claims.
